title: Vanilla's Bush
description: Adding transparency to the Bush texture.
body:
With the addition of bushes to the game, I began to be bothered by its non-vanilla appearance, namely with an opaque texture, as all bushes had, this resource pack corrects this by adding transparency to such a decorative block as the **Bush**!
![The pack is in-game! Shaders don't support the new bush yet(](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cY50CPxB/images/4bb2bf19daeca6daa244b12d9fa354ea91ef4047.png)
